rationale: Independent code review downgraded the final verdict from BLOCKED to PASS_WITH_RISK after the recorder setup failure cleanup bug was fixed and reverified. Acceptance criteria are covered by focused runtime-contract checks plus full lint/typecheck/build/test gates, but residual risk remains around real-browser/manual voice-surface proof, the pre-existing first-load non-guide asset activation window, and capability hydration/runtime-contract debt that is outside this cook plan's locked scope.
